mapper.sql: id, vault_id, path, title, type, tags, related, content_hash, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_page (vault_id, path, title, type, tags, related, content_hash, deleted) VALUES (#{vaultId}, #{path}, #{title}, #{type}, #{tags}, #{related}, #{contentHash}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM wiki_page WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM wiki_page WHERE vault_id = #{vaultId} AND path = #{path} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM wiki_page WHERE vault_id = #{vaultId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY path
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wiki_page WHERE vault_id = #{vaultId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_page (vault_id, path, title, type, tags, related, content_hash, deleted) VALUES (#{vaultId}, #{path}, #{title}, #{type}, #{tags}, #{related}, #{contentHash}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = #{title}, type = #{type}, tags = #{tags}, related = #{related}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, deleted = 0
